text:
Created attachment 245203
bmd-2.1.patch

I updated bmd to 2.1 for a bug fix. The attached 'bmd-2.1.patch' upgrades 
sysutils/bmd port to 2.1. Please apply to the Ports tree.

The release note is shown in the below URL.

https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd/releases/tag/2.1
